name: focus-hud
description: Blast radius you can defend — evidence-only Focus HUD in the editor.

focus.path.description: Path to the focus executable. Empty = search PATH.

focus.base.description: Git base ref for focus audit --local.

focus.gutter.description: Show gutter highlights on changed symbols and blast-radius files.

focus.captionHighlight.description: Deprecated — use focus.inlineExplanations. Kept for compatibility.

focus.inlineExplanations.description: Word-wrapped summary above `def` and ℹ️ detail at the primary edit (virtual — not saved to disk).

focus.lensFontSize.description: CodeLens font size in px for Focus rows. 0 = editor default (~90% of editor font). -1 = match editor.fontSize. Otherwise sets editor.codeLensFontSize in this workspace.

focus.autoAuditOnSave.description: After you save a source file, quietly re-run Focus audit and refresh CodeLens / gutters in place (no HUD pop).

focus.liveBufferOverlay.description: While you edit (even before Save), quietly re-audit using the unsaved buffer so CodeLens tracks what you see.

focus.llmCaptions.description: Opt-in: after Focus: Audit Local, show deterministic rails immediately then LLM-label captions in the background (never on autosave / overlay). Needs FOCUS_LLM_API_KEY for openai/anthropic, or FOCUS_LLM_PROVIDER=ollama with local Ollama.
